text: We just released a new open-weight model on Hugging Face. It runs locally with llama.cpp and GGUF quantization, so you can self-host it on a laptop. Benchmarks and setup guide in the thread.
Cursor now supports Claude Code style agentic workflows with MCP tool use. Our AI coding assistant can call tools and run multi-step tasks. Here is how the agent orchestrator works.
Ollama v0.5 ships faster on-device inference for local LLMs on Apple Silicon (M4). Big VRAM and GPU acceleration improvements for edge AI. Try running quantized models locally today.
New RAG framework for AI app development: pluggable vector db, embeddings, and structured output. Built a chatbot SDK on top of it in an afternoon. Open sourced and free.
Automation tip: chain n8n with a local LLM to build a scheduled workflow pipeline that summarizes your inbox every morning. Full tutorial and template linked.
